description_long: This is a square-based bottle with a short neck and a large, rounded wooden cap. The front and back faces display a detailed label with the word 'MIRTO' prominently featured, along with images of berries and ornate decorative elements. The bottle body is dark, likely representing a glass material, while the cap is a lighter, wood-like texture. The label is vintage in style, with gold and brown tones, and includes additional text and branding details. The bottle appears sturdy and is designed to hold liquid, likely a specialty liqueur.
description: A square, dark glass bottle with a large wooden cap and ornate vintage label reading 'MIRTO' on the front and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate 'MIRTO' label with decorative elements and a wooden cap.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, dark surface of the bottle and the wooden cap, with no visible label.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same 'MIRTO' label and wooden cap visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing a plain, dark surface and the wooden cap, with no label visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front and back faces feature a large, ornate label with the word 'MIRTO' in bold white letters on a gold diagonal banner, images of berries, and additional decorative text in gold and brown tones. The label has a vintage style with intricate borders.
